text.title: Experiment Hypothesis Scoring Core Rules
text.summary: Five testable rules anchoring CRO hypothesis scoring. Each pairs a binary check + sourced rationale.

rule.statement: Every band on every axis (impact / confidence / ease) MUST have at least one concrete behavioural anchor observable in the last 90 days. Anchors are pre-declared in the rubric.

rationale.source: Stevens, Levels of Measurement, 1946; clinical-rubric practice

rule.rationale: Without anchors, scores drift between raters and cycles.

rule.statement: Scores MUST cite ≥1 piece of named evidence (quote, ticket, dashboard row). Numeric scores without evidence default to the lowest band.
rule.rationale: Scores without traceable evidence reduce to political negotiation.

rule.statement: Every rubric run MUST involve ≥2 raters per hypothesis. Discrepancies >1 band trigger a third pass with discussion. Single-rater scores are rejected.
The rubric MUST be frozen for the duration of the review window (quarter or month). Mid-cycle rubric edits invalidate the cycle.
rule.rationale: Moving the ruler invalidates the scoreboard.

rule.statement: A hypothesis MUST clear `projected_lift_pct >= 5` AND `confidence >= 3 (of 5)` to enter the queue. Lower scores are recorded but not queued. The threshold values are frozen with the rubric.

rationale.source: CRO discipline; cf. Conversion Rate Experts queue practice

rule.rationale: Without a floor, low-impact / low-confidence ideas saturate the queue and starve the real winners.

example.title: Anchored CRO hypothesis
example.code: Hypothesis: Move social proof above the fold on /pricing. Projected lift: 8% (anchor: comparable site, A/B test ID #421). Impact: 4 (anchor: page is #1 conversion source). Confidence: 4 (evidence: heatmap shows 67% scroll past fold without engagement; quote: "I missed the testimonials" from user-test #12). Ease: 3 (evidence: ticket FE-201 estimates 1 day FE + 2h QA). Cleared threshold: yes (projected_lift_pct 8 >= 5; confidence 4 >= 3).

example.title: Un-anchored hypothesis
example.code: Hypothesis: Make the landing page better. Impact: 5 (no evidence). Confidence: 5 (no evidence). Ease: 5 (no evidence). ICE = 15 — top of queue.
example.note: Violates evidence-required + behavioural-anchor-per-band. Defaults to lowest band.
